allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: align models and engine with design docs

Domain engine:
- Stats: added AP, ARMOR, MR, SPEED, CRIT_CHANCE, CRIT_DAMAGE \(DEF = alias\)
- player_to_entity\(\) maps all stats, monster_to_entity\(\) with scaling
- damage effect uses entity CRIT_CHANCE/CRIT_DAMAGE instead of hardcoded 0.2/1.5
- apply_damage\(\) now absorbs shield gauge before HP
- 4 new effects: heal, modify_stat, remove_status, shield

Enums:
- DamageType: added MIXED, STASIS \(kept HEALING\)
- New enums: SpellType, EquipmentSlot, Rarity, CombatStatus, TickTrigger

Models:
- Monster enriched: AP, armor, MR, speed, scaling, abilities JSON, boss, gold min/max
- Spell: added spell_type \(BASIC/SKILL/ULTIMATE\)
- New: PlayerEquipmentLoadout \(7 slots\)
- New: CombatSession \(persistent combat state\)
- New: CombatLog \(structured combat logs\)

Battle service:
- Loads statuses.json into Battle.status_defs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python -c "
import subprocess
subprocess.run\([''pip'', ''install'', ''openpyxl''], capture_output=True\)

from openpyxl import load_workbook
wb = load_workbook\(r''C:\\Users\\Thoma\\.claude-worktrees\\Echoes-rework test\\zen-banach\\Echoes\\Items post C_O.xlsx'', data_only=True\)
print\(''SHEETS:'', wb.sheetnames\)
for name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[name]
    print\(f''\\n{""=""*80}''\)
    print\(f''SHEET: {name} \({ws.max_row} rows x {ws.max_column} cols\)''\)
    print\(f''{""=""*80}''\)
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=ws.max_row, values_only=False\):
        vals = []
        for cell in row:
            v = cell.value
            if v is not None:
                vals.append\(f''{cell.coordinate}: {v}''\)
        if vals:
            print\('' | ''.join\(vals\)\)
")
